violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
Cucumbers and asparagus were observed with mold in the walk-in. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The dish machine in the kitchen was not sanitizing at the time of inspection. Technician was on-site at the time of inspection. Per technician, dish machine is set to low-temp with sanitizer solution, however no sanitizer is connected to machine. Technician is working to remedy. Establishment is currently sanitizing all dishware, utensils, and equipment in the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The dumpster was observed overflowing with trash, with cardboard on ground next to dumpster. Refuse areas must be maintained free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The handwash sinks at the bars are lacking proper signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Raw animal foods (raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (breads and vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw animal foods (such as) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in refrigerator and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC moved items to shelving. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Prep unit located on the cook line area was not in good repair, observed with an ambient temperature 0f 44-46 degrees. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dish machine and 3-bay sink. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Inspector provided thermo labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The dumpster was observed overflowing with trash. Dumpsters must be emptied at a frequency necessary to maintain area. PIC stated trash removal is every Monday. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Faucet at the downstairs bar was in poor repair, observed with a leak. PIC stated that they are in process of scheduling repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance at inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink at the bar and in the hookah prep room. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Hand washing sinks at both bars are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the upstairs men's restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Raw eggs were observed stored above breads and vegetables in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw, bagged chicken observed stored over cooked rice in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, mortar and pestle) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Both items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Several foods in the prep unit were observed held at 49-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of all foods requiring refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Prepared chicken wings were observed marked with dates exceeding 7 days. Wings disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Working containers of oils and dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead roaches within establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated PCS has been increased to once per week. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Bags of foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in refrigerator and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

A spoon was observed with handle in direct contact with cooked rice. Utensils used to dispense foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Prep unit located in the kitchen was not in good repair, observed with an ambient of 55 degrees. Unit taken out of use. Technician was scheduled for service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Dish machines located at both bars are not in good repair. PIC stated downstairs dishwasher leaks and the upstairs one is in poor repair. Both bars are presently using disposable drinkware. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:-under the prep unit hoods-gaskets of refrigeration and prep units. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment presently has an air break. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The sinks at upstairs bar and hookah prep room have an accumulation of film and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The faucet at the downstairs bar is in poor repair, observed leaking/dripping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area and kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
